purge: rm -rf ./node_modules && rm-rf ./apps/web/node_modules && rm-rf ./apps/landing/node_modules && rm-rf ./apps/docs/node_modules && echo ✅ All node modules deleted
setup: cp $ATMOS_ROOT_PROJECT_PATH/apps/web/.env.local ./apps/web/.env.local && bun install && echo "✅ env file cp successed" && echo "✅ Root dependency installed"
